human:
POINTS:
- [modules/command/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/command/FluoExec.java:66] All that is advertised in the docs is that this config can be used to create a client.  I think it would be nice for the old config file to just pass it through and for the new config file only set the app name.
v2:
SUMMARY:
This PR splits the monolithic fluo.properties into fluo-conn.properties (connection) and fluo-app.properties (application) to support multiple deployment models. The changes span 67 files affecting configuration loading, cluster runnables, documentation, and adding standalone command classes.

POINTS:
- [docs/metrics.md:20,24,29,119] **Documentation not updated despite being in changed files list.** The file still references `fluo.properties` in 4 places when metrics configuration (`fluo.metrics.reporter.*`) belongs in `fluo-app.properties`. Add `[fluo-app.properties]` link definition and update all references.

- [modules/cluster/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/cluster/runnable/OracleRunnable.java:47] **Hardcoded single-file path incompatible with config split.** Line 47 references `configDir + "/fluo.properties"` but should load both `fluo-conn.properties` AND `fluo-app.properties`. Without this change, YARN-based oracle deployments will fail after the split.

- [modules/cluster/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/cluster/runnable/WorkerRunnable.java:47,74,83] **Same hardcoded single-file path issue as OracleRunnable.** Line 47 has `configDir + "/fluo.properties"`. Additionally, error messages at lines 74 and 83 reference "fluo.properties" which should be updated to reflect the new split config file structure.

- [modules/api/src/test/java/org/apache/fluo/api/config/FluoConfigurationTest.java:173] **Test references non-existent file path after split.** `testLoadingPropsFile()` loads `../distribution/src/main/config/fluo.properties` which no longer exists as a single file. The test must be updated to load from both `fluo-conn.properties` and `fluo-app.properties`, or test the new multi-file loading API.

- [modules/cluster/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/cluster/util/FluoInstall.java:42,55] **Missing companion path methods for split config files.** `getFluoPropsPath()` and `getAppPropsPath()` return single `fluo.properties` paths. The PR needs `getFluoConnPropsPath()`, `getFluoAppPropsPath()`, `getAppConnPropsPath()`, and `getAppAppPropsPath()` methods so callers can construct FluoConfiguration from both files.

- [modules/api/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/api/config/SimpleConfiguration.java:63] **Diff not provided for critical multi-file loading API.** The PR description states "Support loading FluoConfiguration from multiple files" but the diff for SimpleConfiguration.java (which owns the config loading logic) is not included in the provided PR information. The base commit has a private `load()` method with no public multi-file API. This diff must be reviewed to verify thread-safety and correctness of the multi-file merging approach.

- [modules/cluster/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/cluster/command/FluoCommand.java:63-103] **New command cases require verification.** The PR adds new standalone commands (oracle, worker, setup, getjars) but the diff for these new switch cases is not visible. Verify these commands properly construct FluoConfiguration from split config files rather than expecting a single fluo.properties.

- [docs/applications.md:30] **Java example shows incomplete client configuration.** The updated example sets `setApplicationName("myapp")` but doesn't show setting connection properties like `setAccumuloInstance()` or `setInstanceZookeepers()`. Users following this example will get runtime errors. Consider showing a complete working example or clarifying that connection props come from fluo-conn.properties.

- [modules/api/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/api/config/FluoConfiguration.java:51-55] **Property constant naming may confuse users.** The diff shows `setInstanceZookeepers()` replacing `setAccumuloUser/setAccumuloPassword/setAccumuloInstance()` in documentation, but verify that the actual Java API constants (`CLIENT_ACCUMULO_USER_PROP`, etc.) are either properly deprecated or renamed to match the new connection/app split semantics.
v3:
SUMMARY:
This PR refactors Fluo configuration from a single `fluo.properties` file into split connection (`fluo-conn.properties`) and application (`fluo-app.properties`) files, adds multi-file loading support, and introduces ~11 standalone main method classes (FluoOracle, FluoWorker, FluoScan, etc.) replacing the single FluoCommand dispatcher.

POINTS:
- [docs/applications.md:50-55] The new Java API example is incomplete — it shows `new FluoConfiguration()` with only `setInstanceZookeepers("localhost/fluo")` and `setApplicationName("myapp")`, but `FluoConfiguration.hasRequiredClientProps()` (line 547) requires FOUR properties: application name, accumulo user, accumulo password, and accumulo instance. The example will fail validation unless connection credentials are loaded from `fluo-conn.properties`. Either show the full file-loading example (`new FluoConfiguration(new File("fluo-conn.properties"))`) or include all required setter calls.

- [docs/applications.md:218-219] The reference links `[fluo-conn.properties]: ../modules/distribution/src/main/config/fluo-conn.properties` and `[fluo-app.properties]: ../modules/distribution/src/main/config/fluo-app.properties` point to files that do not exist in the distribution module's config directory. Only `fluo.properties` exists there. Ensure the split configuration template files are added to `modules/distribution/src/main/config/` so the documentation links are valid.

- [modules/api/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/api/config/SimpleConfiguration.java:63] The `load(InputStream)` method is private. To support loading from multiple files (fluo-conn.properties + fluo-app.properties), the PR must either: (a) make `load()` public and expose it, or (b) add a varargs constructor like `SimpleConfiguration(File... files)` that calls `load()` for each file. Without this, `FluoConfiguration` cannot load properties from the two split config files.

- [modules/api/src/test/java/org/apache/fluo/api/config/FluoConfigurationTest.java:171] The `testLoadingPropsFile()` test loads from a single file. Add a new test that validates multi-file loading semantics: (1) properties from both files are accessible, (2) verify priority/override behavior when the same key appears in both fluo-conn.properties and fluo-app.properties. The test resources (fluo-conn.properties, fluo-app.properties) are added by the PR but lack test coverage.

- [modules/cluster/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/cluster/runnable/OracleRunnable.java:43] and [WorkerRunnable.java:43] Both runnables hardcode `String propsPath = configDir + "/fluo.properties"`. If the PR splits configuration into fluo-conn.properties and fluo-app.properties, these runnables must be updated to load from both files (or the merged equivalent). Otherwise workers/oracles running in YARN will fail to find expected properties.

- [modules/cluster/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/cluster/util/FluoInstall.java:35] `getFluoPropsPath()` returns `fluo.properties` and `getAppPropsPath()` (line 55) returns `apps/<name>/conf/fluo.properties`. These methods need corresponding `getConnPropsPath()` and `getAppConnPropsPath()` variants, or be refactored to return the split config paths. Otherwise the new standalone commands (FluoList, FluoScan, etc.) cannot locate the split configuration files.

- [modules/cluster/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/cluster/command/FluoCommand.java:40] The PR claims to "Created main methods commands: FluoOracle, FluoWorker, FluoGetJars, FluoSetup, FluoList, FluoWait, FluoScan" — these are 11+ new classes replacing the single FluoCommand dispatcher. Consider whether this architectural change increases maintenance burden (each new class needs its own config loading, error handling, exit code management) vs keeping the dispatcher pattern. If proceeding, ensure all new main classes share a common config-loading utility to avoid duplication.

- [modules/api/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/api/config/FluoConfiguration.java:234-254] The old credential setters (`setAccumuloUser`, `setAccumuloPassword`, `setAccumuloInstance`) remain in the API but the documentation no longer shows them. Either document that credentials should be loaded from `fluo-conn.properties`, or add a migration note explaining that these setters are still valid for programmatic configuration. The property constants (`CLIENT_ACCUMULO_USER_PROP`, etc.) at lines 64-66 are unchanged, so the API contract is preserved but docs are out of sync.

- [docs/install.md] The install documentation table describes `fluo-conn.properties` as "Required for all commands" and `fluo-app.properties` as "Required for all commands except list." Clarify in the migration section how existing deployments with the single `fluo.properties` file should transition — is backward compatibility maintained, or is there a migration script?

- [modules/cluster/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/cluster/runner/YarnAppRunner.java:154] The `init()` method validates `config.hasRequiredAdminProps()` which in turn calls `hasRequiredClientProps()`. When loading from split files, ensure both fluo-conn.properties and fluo-app.properties are merged before validation, otherwise admin operations will fail with "missing required properties" even when credentials are present in the connection file.
v4:
SUMMARY:
This PR splits fluo.properties into connection and application configs, adds multi-file loading support, and creates new command-line entry points. The documentation examples contain a critical completeness issue, and the multi-file loading capability appears to be missing from the public API.

POINTS:
- [docs/applications.md:30-35] **Documentation example is incomplete and will fail at runtime.** The second Java code example shows only `config.setInstanceZookeepers("localhost/fluo")` and `config.setApplicationName("myapp")`, but `hasRequiredClientProps()` (FluoConfiguration.java:547-553) requires four properties: application name, accumulo user, accumulo password, and accumulo instance. The `FluoClientImpl` constructor (core module) throws `IllegalArgumentException` when these are missing. The example must also call `setAccumuloUser()`, `setAccumuloPassword()`, and `setAccumuloInstance()` — or explain that `fluo-conn.properties` must contain these properties. The old code being removed (setAccumuloUser/setAccumuloPassword/setAccumuloInstance) was correct; replacing it with only setInstanceZookeepers/regApplicationName is a regression.

- [modules/api/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/api/config/SimpleConfiguration.java:63] **No public API for multi-file configuration loading.** The PR description claims "Support loading FluoConfiguration from multiple files" but SimpleConfiguration has no public method for adding configurations from multiple sources. The `load(InputStream in)` method (line 63) is private and adds to the internal CompositeConfiguration, but there is no public `addConfiguration()`, `load()`, or multi-file constructor. If the split config design requires loading fluo-conn.properties AND fluo-app.properties, this functionality must be added to the public API.

- [modules/api/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/api/config/FluoConfiguration.java:115-132] **FluoConfiguration constructors delegate to SimpleConfiguration without multi-file support.** All constructors (empty, SimpleConfiguration, InputStream, File, Map) delegate to parent with a single source. No constructor accepts multiple files or streams. This limits the split-config pattern to "choose one file" rather than "layer connection + application configs".

- [docs/metrics.md] **Reference to fluo.properties not updated to reflect split config.** The metrics.md document (base content, line 24) still says "A Fluo application can be configured (in [fluo.properties]) to report metrics" and the link target references the single fluo.properties file. After the split, metrics config belongs in fluo-app.properties (application-level config), so this should be updated for consistency with the other doc changes.

- [modules/cluster/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/cluster/runnable/OracleRunnable.java:44 & WorkerRunnable.java:44] **Hardcoded path to `conf/fluo.properties` in YARN runnables.** Both OracleRunnable and WorkerRunnable reference `configDir + "/fluo.properties"` (line 44 in base). After the config split, these runnables need to load both fluo-conn.properties and fluo-app.properties, or the new combined configuration approach must be reflected here. This is a functional concern if the PR does not address it.

- [modules/cluster/src/main/java/org/apache/fluo/cluster/util/FluoInstall.java:34-35] **FluoInstall.getFluoPropsPath() still returns `fluo.properties`.** The method returns `getFluoConfDir() + "/fluo.properties"`. If the PR splits config into two files, callers of `getFluoConfiguration()` (which loads this single file) will not get the full configuration. This utility class needs updating to reflect the new config structure.
